---
title: "local_pca"
author: "Andrea Estandia"
date: "03/04/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
# Knitr settings: 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
source("./src/wm-europe_source.R")
```

```{r}
pca <- fread(file.path(reports_path, "local_pca", "1000", "pcoa_coords.tsv"))

axisdf <- pca %>%
    group_by(landmark) %>%
    summarize(center = (max(window_id) + min(window_id)) / 2, .groups = "drop")

local_pca <- 
pca %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=window_id, y=PC1, col=as.factor(landmark))) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = axisdf$center,
      labels = gsub("chr|scaffold", "", axisdf$landmark),
      expand = c(0.01, 0.01)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = rep(c("#2C3E50", "#95A5A6"), 26)) +
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
      text = element_text(family = "roboto_condensed", size = 16),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5) 
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 4*sd(pca$PC1, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -4*sd(pca$PC1, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
      x = "\nChromosome",
      y = "PC1\n",
      title = "Local PCA: PC1 values across genomic 1000bp windows",
      subtitle = "Dashed lines indicate 4 standard deviations from the mean"
    )

ggsave(
  local_pca,
  filename = file.path(figures_path, "local_pca", "local_pca_plot.png"),
  width = 9,
  height = 4
)

```
